description: PC baseline perplexity on Gemma 4 31B Config-I (TQ4_1S/Q4_K/Q8_0 mixed) over wikitext-2-raw-v1 test split

model.name: gemma-4-31B-it
model.format: GGUF Config-I (mixed: 327 tq4_1s + 56 q4_K + 28 q8_0 + 422 f32 tensors)

notes: C0 reference perplexity for PC. P0 single-node, no compression beyond TQ4_1S quantization.

Absolute PPL is high (2595) because (a) Gemma 4 31B-it is instruction-tuned and expects chat-template-formatted input, not raw Wikipedia prose; (b) c=512 is short relative to the model's 262144 ctx_train; (c) the Config-I mixed quant adds quantization noise. The same model in chat-template mode produces coherent output (T-0613).

Used as a relative reference for the C0-C7 calibration matrix. Lower-PPL configs in the matrix are expected when (i) using chat-template-aware perplexity, (ii) using a longer context, or (iii) using full-precision weights.
Per-chunk PPL is stable in the 1700-2800 range after chunk 1 (chunk 1 always shows the warm-up prefix-mismatch bump).
Same workload doubles as the GPU power-profile source for T-0616.pc.
